scripts.native:oracle:build: IR_SRCS="$(find src -maxdepth 1 -name 'ir_*.cpp' | sort | tr '\n' ' ')"; c++ -std=gnu++11 -DUNIT_TEST -DSWIGLIB -D_IR_LOCALE_=en-AU -D_IR_ENABLE_DEFAULT_=1 -Isrc -Itest worker/oracle/ir_native_oracle.cpp worker/native/ir_full.cpp src/IRsend.cpp src/IRrecv.cpp src/IRtimer.cpp src/IRutils.cpp src/IRtext.cpp src/IRac.cpp $IR_SRCS -o worker/oracle/ir_native_oracle
scripts.native:build: mkdir -p worker/native/dist && IR_SRCS="$(find src -maxdepth 1 -name 'ir_*.cpp' | sort | tr '\n' ' ')"; em++ -std=gnu++11 -O2 -DUNIT_TEST -DSWIGLIB -D_IR_LOCALE_=en-AU -D_IR_ENABLE_DEFAULT_=1 -Isrc -Itest worker/native/ir_full.cpp src/IRsend.cpp src/IRrecv.cpp src/IRtimer.cpp src/IRutils.cpp src/IRtext.cpp src/IRac.cpp $IR_SRCS -s MODULARIZE=1 -s EXPORT_ES6=1 -s ENVIRONMENT=web,worker -s SINGLE_FILE=1 -s STACK_SIZE=2097152 -s EXPORTED_FUNCTIONS='["_ir_protocols_json","_ir_generate_value_json","_ir_generate_state_json","_ir_generate_raw_json","_ir_generate_method_json","_ir_encode_json","_ir_generate_class_json","_ir_generate_class_method_json","_ir_generate_class_static_json","_ir_generate_class_common_json","_ir_generate_class_string_json","_ir_generate_class_from_common_json","_ir_generate_ac_full_json","_ir_infer_json"]' -s EXPORTED_RUNTIME_METHODS='["ccall"]' -o worker/native/dist/ir_native.js
